items.summary: Persist Super Admin identity and initialization state across canister upgrades so Super Admin access does not get lost after rebuilds/updates.

Add a deterministic, authenticated Super Admin recovery/initialization API that allows regaining Super Admin access without relying on the user finding/copying a Principal ID from external tools. The flow must be safe-by-default and must not allow anonymous callers to become Super Admin.

Update the Admin Dashboard UI (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.tsx) to always show the currently logged-in Principal ID (from the Internet Identity identity object) with a copy-to-clipboard control, so the user can reliably identify their Principal even if backend role/permissions are temporarily "Unknown".

Add a "Super Admin Recovery" section on the Admin Dashboard that provides an alternate way to regain access by triggering the new backend recovery/initialization API and clearly communicating outcomes in English (success/error). Show this section only when the user is logged in but does not currently have Super Admin access.

Make the post-login admin experience reliably resolve the correct role by ensuring a role-initializing shared call is executed after a successful Internet Identity login (so the system does not remain stuck showing role "Unknown"/"Guest" due to only query calls being made).
